name: CFH CABLE INC
notes:
CFH CABLE INC'S general peering policy is simple.

We believe in an open Internet. If you can reach our ports, are present, or share a common Internet exchange point, we will peer with you at no cost (settlement-free peering). We peer openly on Internet Exchanges and always participate in Route Servers on all Internet Exchanges we join. We also offer direct ports at our various facilities. If bilateral peering is required or preferred, let us know.

The easiest way to peer with us is to join the Route Servers on an exchange we are connected to.

Peers must maintain sufficient capacity to exchange traffic without congestion.

Peer must maintain a publicly routable ASN.

The peer should maintain an accurate peeringdb.com entry.

Peer must NOT point default or any static route to AS394109 for traffic that does not match an advertised prefix in BGP.

Peer must NOT reset next-hop information for AS394109.

Peer is expected to maintain consistent routes in all locations unless otherwise agreed before interconnection.

Suggested IPv4 max prefix setting: 100
Suggested IPv6 max prefix setting: 100

** We welcome and encourage dual-stack peering at all peering locations.

Joining TBAX - Tampa Bay Access Exchange / 1 Quarter 2026
